data.name: customSqlQuery1.Sql
data.value: select sum(tab.row_memno)over(order by tab.member_group_no , tab.membership_no ) as rowno, tab.* from ( SELECT decode(lag(sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no,1,null)over( order by sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no , sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no ) ,sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no ,0,1 ) as row_memno , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , trim(sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename)||trim(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name)||' '||trim(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname) as member_name , sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance as share_stock , (select month_name_thai from sc_cnt_m_month where month_no = extract(month from sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date)) as confirm_month_thai , extract(year from sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date)+543 as confirm_year , sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date , (select nvl(sum(data_balance),0) from sc_cls_confirm_data tab , sc_lon_m_rule where membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no and confirm_date = sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date and loan_type = data_type and account_id = '115110' and data_group = 'LON' and data_balance > '0' ) as sum_emer , (select nvl(sum(data_balance),0) from sc_cls_confirm_data tab , sc_lon_m_rule where membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no and confirm_date = sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date and loan_type = data_type and account_id = '115120' and data_group = 'LON' and data_balance > '0' ) as sum_norm , (select nvl(sum(data_balance),0) from sc_cls_confirm_data tab , sc_lon_m_rule where membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no and confirm_date = sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date and loan_type = data_type and account_id = '115130' and data_group = 'LON' and data_balance > '0' ) as sum_spec , (select nvl(sum(data_balance),0) from sc_cls_confirm_data tab , sc_lon_m_rule where membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no and confirm_date = sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date and loan_type = data_type and account_id = '115140' and data_group = 'LON' and data_balance > '0' ) as sum_krongkarn , (select nvl(sum(data_balance),0) from sc_cls_confirm_data tab where membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no and confirm_date = sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date and data_group = 'LON' and data_balance > '0' ) as sum_all_loan , (select nvl(sum(data_balance),0) from sc_cls_confirm_data tab where membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no and confirm_date = sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date and data_group = 'DEP' and data_type = '00' and data_balance > '0' ) as sum_dep_00 , (select nvl(sum(data_balance),0) from sc_cls_confirm_data tab where membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no and confirm_date = sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date and data_group = 'DEP' and data_type = '12' and data_balance > '0' ) as sum_dep_12 , (select nvl(sum(data_balance),0) from sc_cls_confirm_data tab where membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no and confirm_date = sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date and data_group = 'DEP' and data_type = '40' and data_balance > '0' ) as sum_dep_40 , (select nvl(sum(data_balance),0) from sc_cls_confirm_data tab where membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no and confirm_date = sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date and data_group = 'DEP' and data_type = '50' and data_balance > '0' ) as sum_dep_50 , (select nvl(sum(data_balance),0) from sc_cls_confirm_data tab where membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no and confirm_date = sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date and data_group = 'DEP' and data_type = '60' and data_balance > '0' ) as sum_dep_60 , (select nvl(sum(data_balance),0) from sc_cls_confirm_data tab where membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no and confirm_date = sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date and data_group = 'DEP' and data_type = '61' and data_balance > '0' ) as sum_dep_61 , (select nvl(sum(data_balance),0) from sc_cls_confirm_data tab where membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no and confirm_date = sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date and data_group = 'DEP' and data_type = '62' and data_balance > '0' ) as sum_dep_62 from sc_cls_confirm_mem , sc_cls_confirm_data , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_mem_m_ucf_prename where 1=2 --and sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date = '31/07/2023' --and sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no = '050000' /*WHERE*/ order by sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no , sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no )tab
